evals.prompt: What are the electron flux variables available in the THEMIS-D SST dataset? I need to know the exact variable names to pass to get_data().
evals.expected_output: Dataset ID THD_L2_SST identified; electron flux variables listed with names like thd_psef_en_eflux and thd_pseb_en_eflux, with descriptions of full vs burst mode and quality suffix variants.

assertions.name: correct-dataset-id
assertions.description: Output contains the exact dataset ID THD_L2_SST

assertions.name: electron-flux-variable-named
assertions.description: Output contains at least one exact variable name for electron energy flux (e.g. thd_psef_en_eflux or thd_pseb_en_eflux)

assertions.name: mode-distinction-mentioned
assertions.description: Output distinguishes between full mode and burst mode variables (psef vs pseb)

assertions.name: get-data-hint
assertions.description: Output provides actionable guidance on which variable name(s) to pass to get_data()

evals.prompt: I'm looking for MMS FPI electron datasets on CDAWeb. What datasets are available and what variables do they have for electron number density?
evals.expected_output: MMS FPI datasets found (e.g. MMS1_FPI_FAST_L2_DES-MOMS or similar); electron density variable identified with its exact name.

assertions.name: mms-dataset-id-found
assertions.description: Output contains at least one MMS FPI dataset ID (should contain MMS and FPI)

assertions.name: electron-density-variable-named
assertions.description: Output contains an exact variable name for electron number density

assertions.name: multiple-spacecraft-noted
assertions.description: Output acknowledges MMS has multiple spacecraft (MMS1-4) or lists datasets for more than one

evals.prompt: Find me all WIND spacecraft datasets that have magnetic field data, and tell me what the B-field variable names are.
evals.expected_output: WIND magnetic field datasets found (e.g. WI_H0_MFI); variable names for the magnetic field components listed.

assertions.name: wind-mfi-dataset-found
assertions.description: Output contains at least one WIND MFI dataset ID (should match WI_*_MFI pattern)

assertions.name: bfield-variable-named
assertions.description: Output contains at least one exact B-field variable name from the dataset
